rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Command or Scripting Interpreter Creating EXE File

rules.rule_text:
title: Command or Scripting Interpreter Creating EXE File
id: 47d68f87-d0f0-4386-8362-d62b7135a494
status: experimental
description: Detects the suspicious child use of shell or scripting interpreter to
  create a file ending in exe.
references:
- https://security.stackexchange.com/questions/210843/is-it-possible-to-change-original-filename-of-an-exe
- https://github.com/electron/rcedit
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/12/11
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1036.003
- attack.t1036
logsource:
  category: file_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - \cmd.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \powershell_ise.exe
    - \wscript.exe
    - \python.exe
    - \pythonw.exe
    TargetFilename|endswith: .exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
